name: 2fiat
description: Anonymous No KYC credit card, reloadable, usable worldwide
extendedDescription: Create virtual prepaid Mastercard cards and instantly top them up with Bitcoin for online and in-store payments. 2Fiat supports crypto-to-fiat conversion, Apple Pay, Google Pay, 3D Secure, and global spending anywhere Mastercard is accepted.
keywords: debit card, no kyc debit card
